Hi, so as i promised, i redid Sylvestre and made him less corny (in terms of my original version being some sadist-dentist). Added some lore to him, and also a new thing for me: THREE SCENARIOS. First for AnyPOV, second for MalePOV (Cause Sylvestre is canonically gay, and then second scenario is happening in gay bar where Sylvestre canonically likes to go often. As always, leave a review and let me know if the bot is good. If it has any errors/lore and info about char that i missed out, DO write it down in the comments.
